subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Assist Thy servant who implores at the threshold of Thine Unicity, that he may cling to the hem of the robe of Thy grandeur and grasp firmly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی اید عبدک المتضرع بباب احدیتک علی التمسک بذیل رداء کبریائک و التشبث
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
